name: Chicken Barley Broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken thighs, water, barley, onion, poultry seasoning, salt, pepper, paprika, and bay leaf in a Dutch oven.
2. Bring to boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer until chicken is fork-tender, about 45 minutes.
4. Remove chicken from the broth and skim any fat that rises to the surface unless you plan to chill the soup overnight. If chilling, lift the fat off just before reheating.
5. Cool chicken completely, then remove meat from bones and dice it.
6. Add carrots, celery, and mushrooms to the broth; cover and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Return diced chicken to the soup along with peas and parsley.
8. Discard the bay leaf and continue cooking until the soup is heated through.
